channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 AVAX teeters under every moving average, primed for a test of $8.50–$8.86 in days. Only a break above $9.36 could flip the script. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260503-price-prediction-avax-sub-9-breakdown-targets-850-before #AVAX #CryptoNews #PricePredict
